input_roman: PHD applicants ke liye minimum requirements kya hain?
response_roman: PhD applicants ke liye minimum requirements hain: 18 saal taleem ke saath MS/MPhil/MBA degree HEC se manzoor shuda university se honi chahiye, minimum CGPA 3.00 ya first division, aur GRE/GAT ya FAST-NUCES admission test mein kam az kam 60% score hona chahiye.

input_roman: 2026 ke admission process mein application submission ki dates kya hain.
response_roman: FAST-NUCES ke 2025 ke admission schedule mein applications May 19 se July 4 tak submit karni hoti hain.

input_roman: Provisional admission kis ko di ja sakti hain?
response_roman: Provisional admission un candidates ko di ja sakti hai jo results ka intezar kar rahe hain aur maqsoos marks hasil karne par munhasir hai.

input_roman: Admission ke baad candidates ko kaunsi additional support provide ki ja sakti hai?
response_roman: Admission ke baad candidates ko mukhtalif financial assistance, scholarships, loans, aur university assistantships ki sahulat faraham ki ja sakti hai.

input_roman: Applicants ko kaun se documents submit karne zaroori hain?
response_roman: Applicants ko admission confirmation, transcripts, comprehensive exam results, plagiarism report, journal publication aur correspondence, aur foreign reviewer consents submit karne zaroori hain.

input_roman: Fast Newsz mein student counseling ya mental health support service available hai.
response_roman: Mujhe is bare mein kafi maloomat nahi hai.

input_roman: University ki library digital resources aur e-books ka kitna collection hai?
response_roman: Mujhe is bare mein kafi maloomat nahi hai.

input_roman: Kya university apne students ke liye health insurance ya medical coverage plans offer karti hain?
response_roman: Mujhe is bare mein kafi maloomat nahi hai.
